description: Evaluated on audience engagement, pacing, and rhetorical impact.

feedback_templates.pause_ratio: Pause score is {value:.2f}. Strategic pauses emphasize key points and give audiences time to absorb.
feedback_templates.speech_rate: Pacing scored {value:.2f}. Vary your rate - slow for emphasis, faster for momentum.
feedback_templates.clarity_score: Clarity is {value:.2f}. Enunciate deliberately; projection carries authority.
